title: oxera neriifolia subsp. sororia
intro: Oxera neriifolia subsp. sororia, a subspecies of the Oxera neriifolia plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is also known as the 'Island lemongrass' due to its lemongrass-like appearance and fragrance. The medicinal properties of Oxera neriifolia subsp. sororia include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues. The plant's essential oil, extracted through steam distillation, has been used in herbal preparations to treat digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation, as well as to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
